judgment.summary: A high-margin, cash-flow-positive business facing significant revenue contraction and negative growth estimates.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS missed estimates with an actual of -1.49 versus an estimate of 0.04; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Gross margin of 85.5% — indicates high efficiency in core service delivery.
Total cash of $10.44B — provides a substantial liquidity buffer.
Free cash flow of $2.41B (TTM) — shows strong cash generation capabilities.
PEG ratio of 1.13 — suggests valuation is potentially attractive relative to growth.
negatives: Revenue growth of -30.8% YoY — signals a significant decline in business activity.
Analyst growth estimate for the current FY is -72.5% — indicates a massive expected contraction.
Operating margin of -7.1% — shows the business is currently operating at a loss.
Beta of 3.38 — indicates extremely high volatility for the underlying stock.

news.paragraph: Coinbase is currently facing downward pressure following a 6% slump as part of a broader rout in digital asset stocks. No specific imminent catalysts such as earnings or regulatory actions are identified in the recent headlines, but the stock is navigating a period of sector-wide volatility.
